title: PLAY:VIDEO:CONTENT:TEST
description: Loader for Test environment and play-prod-v2 tenant

destroy.evaluate:
/**
         * Pure JavaScript Function that Evaluate if condition should trigger and
         * optionally enriches the update payload of the processed document
         * 
         * @param $document - The document that is being processed
         * @param $window - The Event window object eg. {start:"XXX", end:"YYY"}
         * 
         * @returns A single boolean (true if event should trigger) or [boolean, object]
         * where boolean must be true if event should trigger and the optional object is 
         * the additional document update payload when the event is triggered
         */

        return true;
